name: Linguine Stir-Fry with Green Beans & Garlic
recipeIngredient: 1 lb skinless boneless chicken breast, slivered
1 lb green beans, trimmed and halved
2 red bell peppers, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. In a large nonstick wok or skillet over high heat, heat 1 teaspoon vegetable oil.
3. Add chicken and stir-fry about 4 minutes until firm and opaque. Remove chicken and set aside.
4. Add the remaining teaspoon of oil to the pan.
5. Add green beans; reduce heat to medium, cover, and cook for 7 minutes.
6. Uncover, add red bell peppers, and stir well. Cook an additional 5 minutes.
7. Add garlic and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
8. Stir in teriyaki sauce and chicken broth. Heat to a simmer; toss with chicken and pasta.
9. Serve immediately.
